title: Va Va Nilava Pudichi lyrics Naan Mahaan Alla Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song : Va Va Nilava Pudichi 
Singer : Rahul Nambiyar
Composer: Yuvan
Lyrics : Na Muthukumar

Va va nilava pudichi tharava Velli bommaiyaaki thara
Oh oh vidyum pothuthan maranjipogume katti podu medhuva
Va va nilava pudichi tharava .......... katti podu medhuva
Vanathil yeri enukattu megathai alli mallakattu

Va va kattaalam anbal padikattu ...(2)
Va va nilava pudichi tharava .......... katti podu medhuva

Kavalai nammai silaneram kooru potu kondadum
Theeyinai theendi vazhum podhey dhepathil velicham undagum
Kadalai cherum nadhiyavum thannai thozhaithu uppagum
Aayinum kooda mazhayaai maari mendum adhuve muthaagum
Oru vattam poley vazhvagum oru vasalgal illa kanavagum
Adhil mudhalum illai mudivum illai purindhal thuyaram illai

Va va kattaalam anbal padikattu ...(2)
Va va nilava pudichi tharava .......... katti podu medhuva

Ah.ah.aah iravu paarthu miralathey idhayam verthu thuvalathey
Iravugal mattum illai endral nilavin azhagu theriyadhey
Kanavil neyum vazhathey kalayum podhu varundhathey
Kanavil pooum pookalai ellam kaigalil parithida mudiyadhey
Andha vanam poley uravaagum megangal dhinamum varum pogum
Ada vandhadhu ponal marubadi ondru pudhidhai uruvaagum

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Va Va Nilava Pudichi expresses the joy and beauty of love, portraying a romantic atmosphere that resonates with listeners.

How does this song fit into the movie's plot?

In Naan Mahaan Alla, this song highlights the protagonist's romantic journey, enhancing the emotional depth of the narrative.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Rahul Nambiar and composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja, known for his unique musical style.

When was the song released?

Va Va Nilava Pudichi was released on July 19, 2010, as part of the movie's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Va Va Nilava Pudichi, the protagonist expresses his deep affection through a lively and romantic melody. The song's upbeat tempo and joyful lyrics create a celebratory atmosphere, making it perfect for moments of love and happiness. It beautifully conveys the emotions of longing and joy, resonating with anyone who has experienced love. This track stands out as a highlight in Naan Mahaan Alla, showcasing the charm of romance through music.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Va Va Nilava Pudichi from Naan Mahaan Alla is a vibrant celebration of love, beautifully rendered by Rahul Nambiar. With Yuvan's enchanting composition and Na Muthukumar's heartfelt lyrics, this song captures the essence of romance and joy. Dive into this melodic journey that promises to uplift your spirits and resonate with your heart.
stanzaMeanings: Come, come, the moon is shining brightly, it will give light like a silver doll. Oh, when the light fades away, it will be lost, so let’s hold on to the beauty. Come, come, the moon is shining brightly, let’s hold on to the beauty. In the sky, the clouds will gather and bring rain.
Come, come, let’s learn about love... Come, come, the moon is shining brightly, let’s hold on to the beauty.

Worries will make us weak, but in the fire of life, there will be light. The river that flows will worship itself and will rise. Even the rain will turn into a blessing. Life will flow like a circle, with no doors or visions. There is no beginning or end, and understanding brings no sorrow.
Come, come, let’s learn about love... Come, come, the moon is shining brightly, let’s hold on to the beauty.

Ah, looking at the night, the heart feels lost and restless. If there are no nights, the beauty of the moon will not be known. In dreams, when you walk, it feels like a journey. In dreams, the flowers cannot be held in hand. Relationships will come like the sky, and the clouds will come every day. When it comes, it will create a new form again.
Come, come, let’s learn about love...
